name: digital-marketing-pro
description: The most comprehensive open-source AI marketing plugin — 153 skills, 25 specialist agents, 12-Part Strategy Flow producing the Four Core Documents (61 explicit steps), Two-Views Model, Decision Matrix, Living Project Instruction File. Built for marketing agencies, in-house teams running 50–200 brands, and consultancies. **Installs on Claude Code (CLI + IDE extensions), Anthropic Cowork, OpenAI Codex (CLI + IDE + App), and Google Antigravity 2.0 (CLI + IDE)** — single source repo, single skills/ directory shared via the Agent Skills open standard (donated to the Agentic AI Foundation Dec 2025, adopted by ~40 agent products by May 2026). EU AI Act Article 50 ready (C2PA content provenance signing end-to-end tested against c2pa-python 0.32, pre-publish gate blocks unsigned AI assets for EU campaigns). 6-platform AEO/GEO audit including Google AI Mode (Gemini 3.5 Flash, ~1B MAUs, default conversational search since Google I/O 2026). 16 privacy-law jurisdictions. 14 HTTP MCP connectors (opt-in via .mcp.json.connectors-reference). 77 Python scripts. 167 reference knowledge files. 14 top-level slash commands. v3.8.0 (2026-05-27): real native manifests for Codex (.codex-plugin/plugin.json with the published OpenAI schema) + Antigravity (gemini-extension.json at repo root, per Google's data-agent-kit-starter-pack reference pattern). Replaces the v3.6-v3.7 era invented manifests that were correctly removed in v3.7.13. v3.7.11 closed the resolver loop with scripts/connector_executor.py — stdlib urllib HTTP executor for 8 verified connectors (Slack, HubSpot, Klaviyo, SendGrid, Brevo, Customer.io, Mailchimp, Ahrefs) with credential substitution, write-op --confirm gate, audit logging, per-endpoint success-code handling. 25 OAuth-only connectors return execute_blocked_reason='use MCP path' with the manifest still returned. /digital-marketing-pro:doctor shows readiness; /digital-marketing-pro:execute-action fires individual actions. Test harnesses: 27 resolver scenarios + 17 mock-HTTP-server executor tests, 44/44 pass. MIT-licensed, free, no telemetry. Built and maintained by Indranil Banerjee (https://indranil.in). Part of the Neelverse Marketing Suite alongside ContentForge and SocialForge. Shared model curator (scripts/model_registry.json + resolve_model.py + refresh_models.py): single source of truth for every AI model id used by the plugin, with deprecated-id auto-fall-forward and a refresh_models.py drift report against live provider catalogs (Anthropic / OpenAI / Google). See docs/MODEL-CURATOR.md.
